name: Int4 Embeddings + LeakyReLU²
blurb: Int4 embedding quantization (50% space savings) + LeakyReLU(0.5)² activation (-0.003 BPB confirmed) + lzma compression. Built on PR #414 stack with EMA + GPTQ-lite + warmdown3500. Novel int4 embedding quantization combined with proven LeakyReLU² activation.
author: YourName
